title: Shipping, Receiving, and Inventory Clerks
description: Verify and maintain records on incoming and outgoing shipments involving inventory. Duties include verifying and recording incoming merchandise or material and arranging for the transportation of products. May prepare items for shipment.

tasks.text: Examine shipment contents and compare with records, such as manifests, invoices, or orders, to verify accuracy.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Requisition and store shipping materials and supplies to maintain inventory of stock.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare documents, such as work orders, bills of lading, or shipping orders, to route materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pack, seal, label, or affix postage to prepare materials for shipping, using hand tools, power tools, or postage meter.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record shipment data, such as weight, charges, space availability, damages, or discrepancies, for reporting, accounting, or recordkeeping purposes.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Confer or correspond with establishment representatives to rectify problems, such as damages, shortages, or nonconformance to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Deliver or route materials to departments using handtruck, conveyor, or sorting bins.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Contact carrier representatives to make arrangements or to issue instructions for shipping and delivery of materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine shipping methods, routes, or rates for materials to be shipped.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute amounts, such as space available, shipping, storage, or demurrage charges, using computer or price list.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compare shipping routes or methods to determine which have the least environmental impact.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
